name: recruit-extension
description: Export selected candidates from your LinkedIn Recruiter pipeline view to your CRM and dialer in one click.
author: Joel Haines

scripts.prebuild: dotenv -e .env.production -- node -e "const required=['PLASMO_PUBLIC_MIDDLEWARE_URL','PLASMO_PUBLIC_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN','PLASMO_PUBLIC_ACCESS_CLIENT_ID'];const missing=required.filter(k=>!process.env[k]);if(missing.length){console.error('ERROR: Missing required env vars in .env.production:',missing.join(', '));process.exit(1)}if(process.env.PLASMO_PUBLIC_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN.endsWith('/')){console.error('ERROR: PLASMO_PUBLIC_ACCESS_TEAM_DOMAIN must not have a trailing slash.');process.exit(1)}"
